npcs.name: Mira — Behind the counter of her noodle shop. Watching.
Mira
npcs.description: Noodle shop owner; found you in the alley; gave you the grate location but won't go further — knows more than she says

npcs.name: Silver-haired woman
npcs.description: Older woman, mechanical left hand, patchwork jacket — first to respond in the market

npcs.name: Market vendors and residents — various, watching at a distance
Sable
npcs.description: Silver-haired, mechanical left hand — ran the resonance protocol, pulled you out clean; now believes you may be the bridge to the Resonance

npcs.name: Market vendors and residents — at a distance
Patch — working at the far stall under a blue lamp
Patch
npcs.location: Undercroft market — far stall, blue work lamp
npcs.description: Compact tech veteran — built the dampener, listening from across the market; hears everything

npcs.name: Cord
npcs.description: Broad-shouldered salvage dealer, 50s, bare hands — sorts pre-Severance components with expert precision
